headline: Broadcom expands Google, Anthropic deals; Intel joins Musk's Terafab
summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories.Shares of health insurers, including UnitedHealth (UNH), Humana (HUM), and CVS (CVS), are soaring on news that the government will increase private insurer reimbursements by 2.48%.Broadcom (AVGO) is expanding its deals with Google (GOOG, GOOGL) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT).Intel (INTC) is set to join Elon Musk's Terafab artificial intelligence (AI) chip project with Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI.

content.title: Broadcom expands Google, Anthropic deals; Intel joins Musk's Terafab
content.description:
Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories.

Shares of health insurers, including UnitedHealth (UNH), Humana (HUM), and CVS (CVS), are soaring on news that the government will increase private insurer reimbursements by 2.48%.

Broadcom (AVGO) is expanding its deals with Google (GOOG, GOOGL) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT).

Intel (INTC) is set to join Elon Musk's Terafab artificial intelligence (AI) chip project with Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI.
content.summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories.Shares of health insurers, including UnitedHealth (UNH), Humana (HUM), and CVS (CVS), are soaring on news that the government will increase private insurer reimbursements by 2.48%.Broadcom (AVGO) is expanding its deals with Google (GOOG, GOOGL) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT).Intel (INTC) is set to join Elon Musk's Terafab artificial intelligence (AI) chip project with Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI.

The company’s efforts around this have it going head-to-head with TSMC (TSM), which far surpasses Intel’s production in terms of scale. headline: Intel joins Musk's Terafab AI chip project to power humanoid, data center goals
summary: Intel said on Tuesday it will partner with Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip complex project alongside SpaceX and Tesla to ‌help produce processors powering the tech billionaire's robotics and data center ambitions.  Intel's ‌shares jumped nearly 3% after the news, with the company also saying it hosted Musk at ​its campus the past weekend.  The announcement comes months after Musk laid out plans for Tesla to build a massive artificial-intelligence chip fab to power the EV-maker's autonomous ambitions and suggested the company could work with Intel.

content.title: Intel joins Musk's Terafab AI chip project to power humanoid, data center goals
content.summary: Intel said on Tuesday it will partner with Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip complex project alongside SpaceX and Tesla to ‌help produce processors powering the tech billionaire's robotics and data center ambitions.  Intel's ‌shares jumped nearly 3% after the news, with the company also saying it hosted Musk at ​its campus the past weekend.  The announcement comes months after Musk laid out plans for Tesla to build a massive artificial-intelligence chip fab to power the EV-maker's autonomous ambitions and suggested the company could work with Intel.

thumbnail.caption: Illustration shows Intel logo

headline: JEDEC® Announces May 2026 Forums Focused on Next-Generation Memory for AI, Server, Cloud, and Mobile Computing
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., April 07, 2026--JEDEC Solid State Technology Association, the global leader in the development of standards for the microelectronics industry, today announced that it is hosting a Mobile/Client/Edge Forum on Tuesday, May 12 and a Server/Cloud Computing/AI Forum on Wednesday, May 13 in San Jose, CA. Advance registration is required and space is limited. For more information and registration, visit the JEDEC website.

content.title: JEDEC® Announces May 2026 Forums Focused on Next-Generation Memory for AI, Server, Cloud, and Mobile Computing
content.summary: ARLINGTON, Va., April 07, 2026--JEDEC Solid State Technology Association, the global leader in the development of standards for the microelectronics industry, today announced that it is hosting a Mobile/Client/Edge Forum on Tuesday, May 12 and a Server/Cloud Computing/AI Forum on Wednesday, May 13 in San Jose, CA. Advance registration is required and space is limited. For more information and registration, visit the JEDEC website.

headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Apple, UnitedHealth, Broadcom, Arm, Delta, Intel, Arista, and More
summary: Stocks were sliding Tuesday after President Donald Trump declared that “a whole civilization will die tonight” ahead of his 8 p.m. ET deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  Apple  tumbled 3.4% after Nikkei Asia reported that the iPhone maker’s long-awaited foldable phone had encountered engineering challenges and could face shipping delays.  The federal government on Monday pledged to pay insurers in the Medicare program an average increase of 2.48% next year, well above an originally proposed rate of just 0.09% in January.

content.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Apple, UnitedHealth, Broadcom, Arm, Delta, Intel, Arista, and More
content.summary: Stocks were sliding Tuesday after President Donald Trump declared that “a whole civilization will die tonight” ahead of his 8 p.m. ET deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  Apple  tumbled 3.4% after Nikkei Asia reported that the iPhone maker’s long-awaited foldable phone had encountered engineering challenges and could face shipping delays.  The federal government on Monday pledged to pay insurers in the Medicare program an average increase of 2.48% next year, well above an originally proposed rate of just 0.09% in January.

headline: Hyperscalers Shift To Arm Chips What It Means For AMD Valuation
summary: Major cloud providers are reallocating AI server spending from legacy x86 CPUs by NasdaqGS:AMD and Intel toward proprietary Arm-based chips. headline: Intel to Help SpaceX, Tesla Make Chips. Its Stock Is Up.
summary: SpaceX and  Tesla  are tapping Intel to help the pair realize their AI dreams.  “Terafab” is Elon Musk’s plan to vertically integrate into semiconductor production, which he believes will be a key bottleneck for AI in the coming years.  The fab is a joint effort between Musk’s xAI, SpaceX, and Tesla, which he calls “the most epic chip building exercise in history.”

headline: Intel teams up with Elon Musk on his Terafab endeavor
summary: Intel (INTC) is teaming up with Elon Musk in his new Terafab project, a joint venture between the tech billionaire's Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX (SPAX.PVT), and xAI to begin construction of a chip design facility.Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley breaks down the news.

content.title: Intel teams up with Elon Musk on his Terafab endeavor
content.description:
Intel (INTC) is teaming up with Elon Musk in his new Terafab project, a joint venture between the tech billionaire's Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX (SPAX.PVT), and xAI to begin construction of a chip design facility.

Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley breaks down the news.
content.summary: Intel (INTC) is teaming up with Elon Musk in his new Terafab project, a joint venture between the tech billionaire's Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX (SPAX.PVT), and xAI to begin construction of a chip design facility.Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley breaks down the news.

headline: Intel to Join Musk’s Terafab in Surprise Move, Lifting Stock
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Intel Corp. is joining Elon Musk’s long-shot effort to develop semiconductors for Tesla Inc., SpaceX and xAI, marking a surprising twist in the chipmaker’s comeback bid.Intel will help the so-called Terafab project “refactor” the technology in a chip factory, the company said Tuesday in a post on X, Musk’s social media platform. That’s a stage in the development process that typically helps make chips more powerful or reliable. The chipmaker’s shares jumped 4.2% to $52.91 in New Y
